summary: Romanian soprano, known for her recordings of Verdi heroines and for her partnership with tenor Roberto Alagna. Associated particularly with the role of Violetta in La Traviata and spinto Verdi roles.

works.name: General / Biographical
works.description: Romanian soprano associated primarily with Verdi heroines. Made her premiere recording as Violetta in La Traviata in 1994. Recorded Il Trovatore in 2002 with her on-again-off-again husband, Spanish tenor Roberto Alagna. Also known for interrupting a tenor encore in a 2024 performance of Puccini's Tosca. Recorded an album of Verdi's 'heroines.' Wikipedia

examples: Angela Gheorghiu recorded an album of this composer's 'heroines,' including spinto roles often sung by Lianna Haroutounian and Sonya Yoncheva.

comprehensive_summary: Angela Gheorghiu is a Romanian soprano best known for her interpretations of Verdi heroines and Puccini roles. She made her premiere recording as Violetta in Verdi's La Traviata in 1994. In 2002, she recorded Verdi's Il Trovatore alongside her on-again-off-again husband, the Spanish tenor Roberto Alagna. She has recorded an album devoted to Verdi's heroines, encompassing the spinto soprano roles that have also been sung by performers like Lianna Haroutounian and Sonya Yoncheva. She gained additional notoriety in 2024 when she interrupted a tenor encore during a performance of Puccini's Tosca, declaring 'It's a performance. It's not a recital. Respect me.'

cards.front: Performer: Romanian soprano who made her premiere recording as Violetta in La Traviata in 1994 and recorded Il Trovatore in 2002 with her on-again-off-again husband, Spanish tenor Roberto Alagna
Performer: interrupted a tenor encore in a 2024 performance of Tosca to say 'It's a performance. It's not a recital. Respect me.'
